## Checklist

### Pull Request (D+0, Sunday)

- [ ] Write down an outlined summary of the pull request.

### Blind Review (D+3, Wednesday)

- [ ] Recall everything without looking at anything and write them down.
- [ ] Review the pull request and ask questions.

### Question Answering (D+6, Saturday)

- [ ] Answer questions raised during the blind review stage.

### Final Review (D+9, Tuesday)

- [ ] Do a final review and merge the pull request.
